gist.headline: Learning goes viral
gist.blurb: A new community app called Viralent just sprouted in the greenhouse! It serves up daily articles and interactive quizzes to keep your brain buzzing.
gist.summary: Added Viralent, a new community-built learning app featuring daily informative articles and interactive quizzes, to the app showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now discover and use Viralent to broaden their horizons and test their knowledge directly from the community greenhouse.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy study or library setting representing learning and quizzes. Polly the bee wearing reading glasses, studying a retro monitor, while the Nomnom creature happily eats quiz papers.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, studying a glowing retro computer monitor displaying a pixelated quiz. The round tan nomnom creature sits nearby, happily eating a stack of test papers. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
